headline: CTO at Meltwater focused on enterprise AI, data platforms, and engineering scale
title: Chief Technology Officer
confidenceNote: Multiple strong sources identify Aditya Jami as Meltwater CTO, with consistent background in AI/data platforms, Netflix cloud infrastructure, Yahoo data systems, and Stanford CS.
bioMarkdown: Aditya is CTO at Meltwater, leading technical strategy with emphasis on AI, data science, and enterprise-scale platforms. He previously worked on Netflix cloud infrastructure including Chaos Monkey/Simian Army and Cassandra/Priam, and on large-scale real-time data systems at Yahoo.

primary.label: LinkedIn
primary.note: Identifies him as CTO at Meltwater and references prior Netflix, Yahoo, and Predict Effect experience.

primary.label: Stanford Computer Science profile
primary.note: Personal Stanford CS page describing Predict Effect, Netflix Cloud Solutions, Simian Army/Chaos Monkey, and Cassandra/Priam work.

secondary.label: AI Council speaker bio
secondary.note: Speaker bio summarizing Meltwater CTO role, AI/data science focus, and prior Netflix/Yahoo infrastructure work.

secondary.label: Forbes India
secondary.note: Leadership article describing Jami as Meltwater global CTO and discussing Meltwater's AI and media intelligence platform.

headline: Engineering and product leader building AI developer tooling at W&B / CoreWeave
title: Principal Software Engineer
confidenceNote: Strong evidence connects Adrian Swanberg to CoreWeave/W&B and Weave leadership, but public sources more often describe him as Head of Weave or engineering/product leader and list San Francisco rather than the provided San Diego location/title.
bioMarkdown: Adrian is an engineering and product leader at CoreWeave/Weights & Biases, associated with Weave and GenAI developer tooling. Public activity points to work on AI coding agents, SWE-bench, and LLM observability.

primary.label: LinkedIn
primary.note: Public profile snippet lists CoreWeave experience and describes him as an engineering and product leader.

primary.label: X
primary.note: Profile and posts reference building W&B Weave and work on an o1-based AI programming agent for SWE-bench Verified.

primary.label: Weights & Biases about page
primary.note: Company page lists Adrian Swanberg as Head of Weave and notes W&B is part of CoreWeave.

secondary.label: WeaveHacks judges page
secondary.note: Lists Adrian Swanberg as Head of Weave among hackathon judges.

secondary.label: Luma founder dinner
secondary.note: Event page describes him as VP Engineering at Weights & Biases, recently acquired by CoreWeave.

headline: Senior Engineering Manager at Best Buy leading agentic commerce work
title: Senior Engineering Manager
confidenceNote: LinkedIn, Minnestar, Medium, and UMN Morris sources consistently identify Ahnaf Prio as an engineering leader or senior engineering manager at Best Buy, with startup CTO background.
bioMarkdown: Ahnaf is a Senior Engineering Manager at Best Buy, publicly described as leading an agentic commerce team. He was previously CTO of Invive.io and Tavolo, with experience across biotech/life insurance innovation, restaurant technology, software architecture, and digital transformation.

primary.label: LinkedIn
primary.note: Public profile snippet identifies him as an engineering leader at Best Buy in the Greater Minneapolis-St. Paul area.

primary.label: Medium
primary.note: Personal writing profile for Ahnaf Prio.

primary.label: Medium about page
primary.note: Bio states he serves as senior engineering manager at Best Buy and references Invive.io and Tavolo CTO roles.

secondary.label: Minnestar participant page
secondary.note: Speaker bio says he is a Senior Engineering Manager at Best Buy leading the agentic commerce team and summarizes prior CTO roles.

secondary.label: University of Minnesota Morris
secondary.note: UMN Morris page lists Khondoker Ahnaf Prio as a 2019 alum currently working as Senior Engineering Manager at Best Buy in St. Paul.

headline: CEO and Co-Founder of AnyTeam, building an AI-native sales operating system
title: CEO & Founder
confidenceNote: AnyTeam's site, LinkedIn, and funding announcements consistently identify Ajay Arora as AnyTeam CEO/co-founder and a serial enterprise software founder.
bioMarkdown: Ajay is CEO and Co-Founder of AnyTeam, an AI-native sales operating system for B2B sales teams. He is a serial entrepreneur with prior founder/operator roles at BluBracket and Vera, and experience in enterprise software and cybersecurity exits.

primary.label: AnyTeam about page
primary.note: Company page lists Ajay Arora as CEO & Co-Founder and describes AnyTeam's AI-native sales product thesis.

primary.label: LinkedIn
primary.note: Public profile snippet lists him as CEO & Co-Founder at AnyTeam and references BluBracket and Vera experience.

primary.label: AnyTeam launch post
primary.note: Launch post says AnyTeam was founded by Ajay Arora and Jeff Yoshimura and describes the AI-native sales OS.

secondary.label: Crosslink Capital funding announcement
secondary.note: Funding announcement says AnyTeam raised $10M and describes Arora as a three-time founder with successful exits including BluBracket's acquisition by HashiCorp.

secondary.label: Unusual Ventures interview
secondary.note: Background source on Ajay Arora's prior BluBracket and Vera cybersecurity founder work.

headline: Senior Staff Software Engineer at LinkedIn building large-scale AI systems and agent context infrastructure
title: Senior Staff Software Engineer
location: San Francisco Bay Area, CA, US
confidenceNote: LinkedIn, QCon AI, podcast, and AI Engineer schedule sources consistently identify Ajay Prakash as a LinkedIn senior/staff-level engineer working on AI agents, prompt engineering, and context infrastructure.
bioMarkdown: Ajay is a Senior Staff Software Engineer at LinkedIn focused on scalable enterprise AI agents and large-scale systems. Public talks and podcast appearances reference work on prompt engineering playgrounds, MCP-based context layers, and helping AI agents use organizational knowledge.

primary.label: LinkedIn
primary.note: Public profile snippet describes him as an AI engineer at LinkedIn with expertise building scalable enterprise AI agents.

primary.label: QCon AI Boston speaker page
primary.note: Speaker bio lists him as Senior Staff Software Engineer at LinkedIn with 14 years of software experience building large-scale systems and AI.

primary.label: QCon AI presentation
primary.note: Talk page links him to LinkedIn's organizational context layer for AI agents with MCP.

secondary.label: What the Dev podcast
secondary.note: Podcast episode discusses Ajay Prakash and Lukasz Karolewski building a prompt engineering playground at LinkedIn.

secondary.label: AI Engineer schedule
secondary.note: Conference schedule lists Ajay Prakash as Senior Staff Software Engineer at LinkedIn speaking on context engineering for agents.
